en.title: SQL Expert
en.prompt: I hope you can act as an expert in databases. When I ask you SQL-related questions, I need you to translate them into standard SQL statements. If my descriptions are not accurate enough, please provide appropriate feedback
en.remark: Answer SQL-related questions or output standard SQL statements. Contributed by @lovedworking.

related.title: Code Anything Now
related.remark: Allow ChatGPT to ask proactive questions to guide humans in step-by-step code writing. Collected from Snackprompt, shared by @fuxinsen.

related.title: Code Interpreter
related.remark: Let AI explain the function of each line of code. Contributed by @Tractor1928 and @yiqiongwu.

related.title: WeChat Mini Program
related.remark: Auxiliary WeChat mini program development. Contributed by @gandli.

metaDescription: Stuck on SQL? Ask database questions or get standard SQL statements generated. Solve complex query problems efficiently.

faq.q: Can the generated SQL run on production?
faq.a: Basic queries (SELECT, JOIN, GROUP BY) are usually correct. Performance (index selection, large-table optimization) and database-specific syntax (MySQL 8 vs. Postgres 15) can differ. Validate on a test DB first, or check the query plan with EXPLAIN.

faq.q: Will the AI ask questions when the description is unclear?
faq.a: The prompt says "if the description is imprecise, provide feedback," but the AI sometimes guesses instead of asking. Paste the table structure, data size, and sample fields at the start to save back-and-forth clarification.
